reviews.review_title: I love this game but it needs fixing
reviews.review_description: I love this game I would do anything to be a staff or developer in it and it would mean the world for me and that is why I love this game but I didn't give it a 5 star review because the monster is broken it's stuck in a walking animation floating in the air and it won't move so you can easily find all the generators boringly with no excitement of being chased by the monster maybe it's just me but I think this goes for everyone else cuz even when I uninstalled and reinstalled my game It was still there
